---
title: 'catalog remove-alias'
---

Remove one or more aliases. The underlying entries are left untouched—
use [`catalog remove`](remove.qmd) to remove an entry itself.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog remove-alias <aliases...> [OPTIONS]
```

## Arguments

- **`aliases`**—One or more alias names. Use [`catalog list-aliases`](list-aliases.qmd)
  to see registered aliases.

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--sync` / `--no-sync` | `--sync` | Push the catalog to its remotes after removing aliases. |

## Examples

```bash
xorq catalog remove-alias penguins-prod
xorq catalog remove-alias penguins-prod current
```

Unknown aliases produce an error and abort the operation before any change is committed.
